    SELECT [v].[ID], [v].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [v].[1099], [v].[ACCOUNT_NO], [v].[ADDRESS1], [v].[ADDRESS2], [v].[AFFIDAVIT_DATE], [v].[CAC], [v].[CITY], [v].[CREATED_BY], [v].[CREATED_DATE], [v].[CUSTOMER_NUM], [v].[EMAIL_ADDRESS], [v].[FAX_NUMBER], [v].[ACTIVE_IND], [v].[MEMO], [v].[MODIFIED_BY], [v].[MODIFIED_DATE], [v].[NAME], [v].[PHONE], [v].[POC], [v].[REMITT_INVOICE], [v].[REMITT_INVOICE_YN], [v].[SAC], [v].[STATE], [v].[TAX_ID], [v].[VENDORB_ADDRESS1], [v].[VENDORB_ADDRESS2], [v].[VENDORB_CITY], [v].[VENDORB_PHONE], [v].[VENDORB_STATE], [v].[VENDORB_ZIP], [v].[VENDORCAT], [v].[VENDOR_NO], [v].[VENDOR_TYPE], [v].[W9Date], [v].[ZIP]
    FROM [VENDOR] AS [v]
    WHERE [v].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t0] ON [i0].[REQVENDOR] = [t0].[ID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i1].[ID], [i1].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i1].[CREATED_BY], [i1].[CREATED_DATE], [i1].[MODIFIED_BY], [i1].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i1].[REQBALANCE], [i1].[REQDISCOUNT], [i1].[REQID], [i1].[REQQUANTITY], [i1].[REQTOTAL], [i1].[REQTOTALPRICE], [i1].[REQUNITPRICE]
    FROM [IHPOPRICING] AS [i1]
    WHERE [i1].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t1] ON [t].[ID] = [t1].[REQID]
LEFT JOIN [CODE_VALUES] AS [c] ON [t].[STATUS] = [c].[CODE_VALUE_ID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[ID], [c0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [c0].[AUTHORZIEDSIGNATURE], [c0].[CREATED_BY], [c0].[CREATED_DATE], [c0].[IHAC], [c0].[MODIFIED_BY], [c0].[MODIFIED_DATE], [c0].[POAMOUNT], [c0].[POCOMPLETE], [c0].[POCOMPLETEDATE], [c0].[PODATEREQUIRED], [c0].[PODESCRIPTION], [c0].[POMEMO], [c0].[PONUMBER], [c0].[POOPENDATE], [c0].[POSHIPVIA], [c0].[POTRANSMITTDATE], [c0].[POTYPE], [c0].[POFOB], [c0].[SAC], [c0].[WHOID]
    FROM [COUNTYPO] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t2] ON [t].[REQ_PO_ID] = [t2].[ID]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [i2].[WorkflowId], [i2].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i2].[STEP_LIMIT], [i2].[stepRole], [i2].[stepSeq], [i2].[StepStatus], [i2].[StepName]
    FROM [IHPO_WORKFLOW_STEPS] AS [i2]
    WHERE [i2].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_1
) AS [t3] ON [t].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ] = [t3].[WorkflowId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i3].[ID], [i3].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i3].[CREATED_BY], [i3].[CREATED_DATE], [i3].[MODIFIED_BY], [i3].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i3].[REQ_APPROVEDBY], [i3].[REQ_APPROVED_ROLE], [i3].[REQ_COMMENT], [i3].[REQID], [i3].[REQ_STATUS], [i3].[REQ_STATUS_MESSAGE]
    FROM [IHPOAPPROVAL] AS [i3]
    WHERE [i3].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t4] ON [t].[ID] = [t4].[REQID]
ORDER BY [t].[MODIFIED_DATE] DESC, [t].[ID], [i0].[ID], [t0].[ID], [t1].[ID], [c].[CODE_VALUE_ID], [t2].[ID], [t3].[WorkflowId]

    SELECT [i].[ID], [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i].[ATTENTO], [i].[CHECKOUT], [i].[CHECKOUTBYID], [i].[COMBINE], [i].[COMPLETE], [i].[CORRECTED], [i].[CREATED_BY], [i].[CREATED_DATE], [i].[INHOUSEPOMEMO], [i].[MODIFIED_BY], [i].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i].[PREPAREDBY], [i].[REQCHECK], [i].[REQDATE], [i].[REQDATECOMPLETE], [i].[REQDATEREQUIRED], [i].[REQDESCRIPTION], [i].[REQIHPONO], [i].[REQNUMBER], [i].[REQ_PO_ID], [i].[REQPRINT], [i].[SHIPTO], [i].[STATUS], [i].[STATUS_MESSAGE], [i].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ]

    SELECT [t].[ID], [t].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [t].[ATTENTO], [t].[CHECKOUT], [t].[CHECKOUTBYID], [t].[COMBINE], [t].[COMPLETE], [t].[CORRECTED], [t].[CREATED_BY], [t].[CREATED_DATE], [t].[INHOUSEPOMEMO], [t].[MODIFIED_BY], [t].[MODIFIED_DATE], [t].[PREPAREDBY], [t].[REQCHECK], [t].[REQDATE], [t].[REQDATECOMPLETE], [t].[REQDATEREQUIRED], [t].[REQDESCRIPTION], [t].[REQIHPONO], [t].[REQNUMBER], [t].[REQ_PO_ID], [t].[REQPRINT], [t].[SHIPTO], [t].[STATUS], [t].[STATUS_MESSAGE], [t].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ]
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT [i].[ID], [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i].[ATTENTO], [i].[CHECKOUT], [i].[CHECKOUTBYID], [i].[COMBINE], [i].[COMPLETE], [i].[CORRECTED], [i].[CREATED_BY], [i].[CREATED_DATE], [i].[INHOUSEPOMEMO], [i].[MODIFIED_BY], [i].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i].[PREPAREDBY], [i].[REQCHECK], [i].[REQDATE], [i].[REQDATECOMPLETE], [i].[REQDATEREQUIRED], [i].[REQDESCRIPTION], [i].[REQIHPONO], [i].[REQNUMBER], [i].[REQ_PO_ID], [i].[REQPRINT], [i].[SHIPTO], [i].[STATUS], [i].[STATUS_MESSAGE], [i].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ]
        FROM [IHPO] AS [i]
        WHERE [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0 AND [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__OrgAccountId_0 AND DATEPART(year, [i].[REQDATE]) >= DATEPART(year, GETDATE()) - 1
    ) AS [t]
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN [IHPODETAILS] AS [i0] ON [t0].[ID] = [i0].[REQID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i1].[ID], [i1].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i1].[CREATED_BY], [i1].[CREATED_DATE], [i1].[MODIFIED_BY], [i1].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i1].[REQ_APPROVEDBY], [i1].[REQ_APPROVED_ROLE], [i1].[REQ_COMMENT], [i1].[REQID], [i1].[REQ_STATUS], [i1].[REQ_STATUS_MESSAGE]
    FROM [IHPOAPPROVAL] AS [i1]
    WHERE [i1].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[ID] = [t1].[REQID]
ORDER BY [t0].[ID], [i0].[ID]

FROM (
    SELECT [i].[ID], [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i].[ATTENTO], [i].[CHECKOUT], [i].[CHECKOUTBYID], [i].[COMBINE], [i].[COMPLETE], [i].[CORRECTED], [i].[CREATED_BY], [i].[CREATED_DATE], [i].[INHOUSEPOMEMO], [i].[MODIFIED_BY], [i].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i].[PREPAREDBY], [i].[REQCHECK], [i].[REQDATE], [i].[REQDATECOMPLETE], [i].[REQDATEREQUIRED], [i].[REQDESCRIPTION], [i].[REQIHPONO], [i].[REQNUMBER], [i].[REQ_PO_ID], [i].[REQPRINT], [i].[SHIPTO], [i].[STATUS], [i].[STATUS_MESSAGE], [i].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ]
    FROM [IHPO] AS [i]
    WHERE [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0 AND [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__OrgAccountId_0 AND DATEPART(year, [i].[REQDATE]) >= DATEPART(year, GETDATE()) - 1
    ORDER BY [i].[MODIFIED_DATE] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [IHPODETAILS] AS [i0] ON [t].[ID] = [i0].[REQID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [v].[ID], [v].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [v].[1099], [v].[ACCOUNT_NO], [v].[ADDRESS1], [v].[ADDRESS2], [v].[AFFIDAVIT_DATE], [v].[CAC], [v].[CITY], [v].[CREATED_BY], [v].[CREATED_DATE], [v].[CUSTOMER_NUM], [v].[EMAIL_ADDRESS], [v].[FAX_NUMBER], [v].[ACTIVE_IND], [v].[MEMO], [v].[MODIFIED_BY], [v].[MODIFIED_DATE], [v].[NAME], [v].[PHONE], [v].[POC], [v].[REMITT_INVOICE], [v].[REMITT_INVOICE_YN], [v].[SAC], [v].[STATE], [v].[TAX_ID], [v].[VENDORB_ADDRESS1], [v].[VENDORB_ADDRESS2], [v].[VENDORB_CITY], [v].[VENDORB_PHONE], [v].[VENDORB_STATE], [v].[VENDORB_ZIP], [v].[VENDORCAT], [v].[VENDOR_NO], [v].[VENDOR_TYPE], [v].[W9Date], [v].[ZIP]
    FROM [VENDOR] AS [v]
    WHERE [v].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t0] ON [i0].[REQVENDOR] = [t0].[ID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i1].[ID], [i1].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i1].[CREATED_BY], [i1].[CREATED_DATE], [i1].[MODIFIED_BY], [i1].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i1].[REQBALANCE], [i1].[REQDISCOUNT], [i1].[REQID], [i1].[REQQUANTITY], [i1].[REQTOTAL], [i1].[REQTOTALPRICE], [i1].[REQUNITPRICE]
    FROM [IHPOPRICING] AS [i1]
    WHERE [i1].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t1] ON [t].[ID] = [t1].[REQID]
LEFT JOIN [CODE_VALUES] AS [c] ON [t].[STATUS] = [c].[CODE_VALUE_ID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[ID], [c0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [c0].[AUTHORZIEDSIGNATURE], [c0].[CREATED_BY], [c0].[CREATED_DATE], [c0].[IHAC], [c0].[MODIFIED_BY], [c0].[MODIFIED_DATE], [c0].[POAMOUNT], [c0].[POCOMPLETE], [c0].[POCOMPLETEDATE], [c0].[PODATEREQUIRED], [c0].[PODESCRIPTION], [c0].[POMEMO], [c0].[PONUMBER], [c0].[POOPENDATE], [c0].[POSHIPVIA], [c0].[POTRANSMITTDATE], [c0].[POTYPE], [c0].[POFOB], [c0].[SAC], [c0].[WHOID]
    FROM [COUNTYPO] AS [c0]
    WHERE [c0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t2] ON [t].[REQ_PO_ID] = [t2].[ID]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [i2].[WorkflowId], [i2].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i2].[STEP_LIMIT], [i2].[stepRole], [i2].[stepSeq], [i2].[StepStatus], [i2].[StepName]
    FROM [IHPO_WORKFLOW_STEPS] AS [i2]
    WHERE [i2].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_1
) AS [t3] ON [t].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ] = [t3].[WorkflowId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i3].[ID], [i3].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i3].[CREATED_BY], [i3].[CREATED_DATE], [i3].[MODIFIED_BY], [i3].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i3].[REQ_APPROVEDBY], [i3].[REQ_APPROVED_ROLE], [i3].[REQ_COMMENT], [i3].[REQID], [i3].[REQ_STATUS], [i3].[REQ_STATUS_MESSAGE]
    FROM [IHPOAPPROVAL] AS [i3]
    WHERE [i3].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t4] ON [t].[ID] = [t4].[REQID]
ORDER BY [t].[MODIFIED_DATE] DESC, [t].[ID], [i0].[ID], [t0].[ID], [t1].[ID], [c].[CODE_VALUE_ID], [t2].[ID], [t3].[WorkflowId]

) AS [t3] ON [t].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ] = [t3].[WorkflowId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i3].[ID], [i3].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i3].[CREATED_BY], [i3].[CREATED_DATE], [i3].[MODIFIED_BY], [i3].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i3].[REQ_APPROVEDBY], [i3].[REQ_APPROVED_ROLE], [i3].[REQ_COMMENT], [i3].[REQID], [i3].[REQ_STATUS], [i3].[REQ_STATUS_MESSAGE]
    FROM [IHPOAPPROVAL] AS [i3]
    WHERE [i3].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t4] ON [t].[ID] = [t4].[REQID]
ORDER BY [t].[MODIFIED_DATE] DESC, [t].[ID], [i0].[ID], [t0].[ID], [t1].[ID], [c].[CODE_VALUE_ID], [t2].[ID], [t3].[WorkflowId]

[e].[PREV_YEAR_EMP_PAY_SALARY], [e].[PREV_YEAR_EMP_SALARY], [e].[PRO_START], [e].[REHIRE_DATE], [e].[RUN_PAYROLL_FROM_TIMECARD], [e].[SBALANCE], [e].[SEASONAL], [e].[STEP], [e].[SUB], [e].[TCMID], [e].[TERMINATION_DATE], [e].[TYPEID], [e].[UNION_ID], [e].[UNLISTED], [e].[VBALANCE], [e].[VACA_CARRYOVER], [e].[WACCONYINUOUS], [e].[WACPERIODIC], [e].[EMP_WRK_YR_START], [e].[EMP_WRK_YR_STOP], [e].[YEARS], [e].[YEARSDD], [t].[EMP_ID], [t].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [t].[ACTIVE_IND], [t].[ALSO_KNOWN_AS], [t].[AUTO_RUN_PRIMARY_JOB_IND ], [t].[CLOCK_NUMBER], [t].[CREATED_BY], [t].[CREATED_DATE], [t].[DATE_OF_BIRTHDAY], [t].[DRIVER_LICENSE_NUMBER], [t].[EMAIL_ADDRESS], [t].[EMPLOYEE_NUMBER], [t].[FIRST_NAME], [t].[GENDER_CODE ], [t].[GROUP_NUMBER], [t].[HOME_PHONE_NUMBER], [t].[LAST_NAME], [t].[MIDDLE_NAME], [t].[MOBILE_PHONE_NUMBER], [t].[MODIFIED_BY], [t].[MODIFIED_DATE], [t].[PERSONAL_EMAIL_ADDRESS], [t].[RACE_CODE], [t].[SPOUSE_NAME], [t].[SSN], [t].[SUPERVISOR_IND], [t].[USER_NAME]
FROM [EMPLOYEE_PAYROLL_SETUP] AS [e]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [e0].[EMP_ID], [e0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [e0].[ACTIVE_IND], [e0].[ALSO_KNOWN_AS], [e0].[AUTO_RUN_PRIMARY_JOB_IND ], [e0].[CLOCK_NUMBER], [e0].[CREATED_BY], [e0].[CREATED_DATE], [e0].[DATE_OF_BIRTHDAY], [e0].[DRIVER_LICENSE_NUMBER], [e0].[EMAIL_ADDRESS], [e0].[EMPLOYEE_NUMBER], [e0].[FIRST_NAME], [e0].[GENDER_CODE ], [e0].[GROUP_NUMBER], [e0].[HOME_PHONE_NUMBER], [e0].[LAST_NAME], [e0].[MIDDLE_NAME], [e0].[MOBILE_PHONE_NUMBER], [e0].[MODIFIED_BY], [e0].[MODIFIED_DATE], [e0].[PERSONAL_EMAIL_ADDRESS], [e0].[RACE_CODE], [e0].[SPOUSE_NAME], [e0].[SSN], [e0].[SUPERVISOR_IND], [e0].[USER_NAME]
    FROM [EMPLOYEES] AS [e0]
    WHERE [e0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t] ON [e].[EMP_ID] = [t].[EMP_ID]
WHERE [e].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0 AND [e].[EMP_ID] IN (
    SELECT [s].[value]
    FROM OPENJSON(@__salariedEmpIds_0) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [s]
)

    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT [i].[ID], [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i].[ATTENTO], [i].[CHECKOUT], [i].[CHECKOUTBYID], [i].[COMBINE], [i].[COMPLETE], [i].[CORRECTED], [i].[CREATED_BY], [i].[CREATED_DATE], [i].[INHOUSEPOMEMO], [i].[MODIFIED_BY], [i].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i].[PREPAREDBY], [i].[REQCHECK], [i].[REQDATE], [i].[REQDATECOMPLETE], [i].[REQDATEREQUIRED], [i].[REQDESCRIPTION], [i].[REQIHPONO], [i].[REQNUMBER], [i].[REQ_PO_ID], [i].[REQPRINT], [i].[SHIPTO], [i].[STATUS], [i].[STATUS_MESSAGE], [i].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ]

) AS [t0]

    SELECT [c0].[ID], [c0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [c0].[AUTHORZIEDSIGNATURE], [c0].[CREATED_BY], [c0].[CREATED_DATE], [c0].[IHAC], [c0].[MODIFIED_BY], [c0].[MODIFIED_DATE], [c0].[POAMOUNT], [c0].[POCOMPLETE], [c0].[POCOMPLETEDATE], [c0].[PODATEREQUIRED], [c0].[PODESCRIPTION], [c0].[POMEMO], [c0].[PONUMBER], [c0].[POOPENDATE], [c0].[POSHIPVIA], [c0].[POTRANSMITTDATE], [c0].[POTYPE], [c0].[POFOB], [c0].[SAC], [c0].[WHOID]

) AS [t4] ON [t0].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ] = [t4].[Id]

    WHERE [i4].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t5] ON [t0].[ID] = [t5].[REQID]
ORDER BY [t0].[ID], [i1].[ID], [t1].[ID], [t2].[ID], [c].[CODE_VALUE_ID], [t3].[ID], [t4].[Id]

    SELECT [v0].[ID], [v0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [v0].[1099], [v0].[ACCOUNT_NO], [v0].[ADDRESS1], [v0].[ADDRESS2], [v0].[AFFIDAVIT_DATE], [v0].[CAC], [v0].[CITY], [v0].[CREATED_BY], [v0].[CREATED_DATE], [v0].[CUSTOMER_NUM], [v0].[EMAIL_ADDRESS], [v0].[FAX_NUMBER], [v0].[ACTIVE_IND], [v0].[MEMO], [v0].[MODIFIED_BY], [v0].[MODIFIED_DATE], [v0].[NAME], [v0].[PHONE], [v0].[POC], [v0].[REMITT_INVOICE], [v0].[REMITT_INVOICE_YN], [v0].[SAC], [v0].[STATE], [v0].[TAX_ID], [v0].[VENDORB_ADDRESS1], [v0].[VENDORB_ADDRESS2], [v0].[VENDORB_CITY], [v0].[VENDORB_PHONE], [v0].[VENDORB_STATE], [v0].[VENDORB_ZIP], [v0].[VENDORCAT], [v0].[VENDOR_NO], [v0].[VENDOR_TYPE], [v0].[W9Date], [v0].[ZIP]
    FROM [VENDOR] AS [v0]
    WHERE [v0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t] ON [v].[VENDOR_NO] = [t].[ID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[ID], [c].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [c].[AUTHORZIEDSIGNATURE], [c].[CREATED_BY], [c].[CREATED_DATE], [c].[IHAC], [c].[MODIFIED_BY], [c].[MODIFIED_DATE], [c].[POAMOUNT], [c].[POCOMPLETE], [c].[POCOMPLETEDATE], [c].[PODATEREQUIRED], [c].[PODESCRIPTION], [c].[POMEMO], [c].[PONUMBER], [c].[POOPENDATE], [c].[POSHIPVIA], [c].[POTRANSMITTDATE], [c].[POTYPE], [c].[POFOB], [c].[SAC], [c].[WHOID]
    FROM [COUNTYPO] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t0] ON [v].[PO_ID] = [t0].[ID]
WHERE [v].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0 AND [v].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__OrgAccountId_0 AND CONVERT(varchar(100), [v].[VOUCHER_AMOUNT]) LIKE @__p_1_rewritten ESCAPE N'\' AND [t].[NAME] LIKE @__p_2_rewritten ESCAPE N'\' AND CONVERT(varchar(100), [v].[VOUCHER_BALANCE]) LIKE @__p_3_rewritten ESCAPE N'\' AND [v].[VOUCHER_VOUCH_NO] LIKE @__p_4_rewritten ESCAPE N'\'
ORDER BY [v].[MODIFIED_DATE] DESC

    SELECT [c0].[ID], [c0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [c0].[AUTHORZIEDSIGNATURE], [c0].[CREATED_BY], [c0].[CREATED_DATE], [c0].[IHAC], [c0].[MODIFIED_BY], [c0].[MODIFIED_DATE], [c0].[POAMOUNT], [c0].[POCOMPLETE], [c0].[POCOMPLETEDATE], [c0].[PODATEREQUIRED], [c0].[PODESCRIPTION], [c0].[POMEMO], [c0].[PONUMBER], [c0].[POOPENDATE], [c0].[POSHIPVIA], [c0].[POTRANSMITTDATE], [c0].[POTYPE], [c0].[POFOB], [c0].[SAC], [c0].[WHOID]

) AS [t4] ON [t0].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ] = [t4].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i4].[ID], [i4].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i4].[CREATED_BY], [i4].[CREATED_DATE], [i4].[MODIFIED_BY], [i4].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i4].[REQ_APPROVEDBY], [i4].[REQ_APPROVED_ROLE], [i4].[REQ_COMMENT], [i4].[REQID], [i4].[REQ_STATUS], [i4].[REQ_STATUS_MESSAGE]

    WHERE [i4].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t5] ON [t0].[ID] = [t5].[REQID]
ORDER BY [t0].[ID], [i1].[ID], [t1].[ID], [t2].[ID], [c].[CODE_VALUE_ID], [t3].[ID], [t4].[Id]

    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT [i].[ID], [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i].[ATTENTO], [i].[CHECKOUT], [i].[CHECKOUTBYID], [i].[COMBINE], [i].[COMPLETE], [i].[CORRECTED], [i].[CREATED_BY], [i].[CREATED_DATE], [i].[INHOUSEPOMEMO], [i].[MODIFIED_BY], [i].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i].[PREPAREDBY], [i].[REQCHECK], [i].[REQDATE], [i].[REQDATECOMPLETE], [i].[REQDATEREQUIRED], [i].[REQDESCRIPTION], [i].[REQIHPONO], [i].[REQNUMBER], [i].[REQ_PO_ID], [i].[REQPRINT], [i].[SHIPTO], [i].[STATUS], [i].[STATUS_MESSAGE], [i].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ]

    ) AS [t]
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_4 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_5 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN [IHPODETAILS] AS [i1] ON [t0].[ID] = [i1].[REQID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [v].[ID], [v].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [v].[1099], [v].[ACCOUNT_NO], [v].[ADDRESS1], [v].[ADDRESS2], [v].[AFFIDAVIT_DATE], [v].[CAC], [v].[CITY], [v].[CREATED_BY], [v].[CREATED_DATE], [v].[CUSTOMER_NUM], [v].[EMAIL_ADDRESS], [v].[FAX_NUMBER], [v].[ACTIVE_IND], [v].[MEMO], [v].[MODIFIED_BY], [v].[MODIFIED_DATE], [v].[NAME], [v].[PHONE], [v].[POC], [v].[REMITT_INVOICE], [v].[REMITT_INVOICE_YN], [v].[SAC], [v].[STATE], [v].[TAX_ID], [v].[VENDORB_ADDRESS1], [v].[VENDORB_ADDRESS2], [v].[VENDORB_CITY], [v].[VENDORB_PHONE], [v].[VENDORB_STATE], [v].[VENDORB_ZIP], [v].[VENDORCAT], [v].[VENDOR_NO], [v].[VENDOR_TYPE], [v].[W9Date], [v].[ZIP]

    WHERE [v].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t1] ON [i1].[REQVENDOR] = [t1].[ID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i2].[ID], [i2].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i2].[CREATED_BY], [i2].[CREATED_DATE], [i2].[MODIFIED_BY], [i2].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i2].[REQBALANCE], [i2].[REQDISCOUNT], [i2].[REQID], [i2].[REQQUANTITY], [i2].[REQTOTAL], [i2].[REQTOTALPRICE], [i2].[REQUNITPRICE]
    FROM [IHPOPRICING] AS [i2]
    WHERE [i2].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t2] ON [t0].[ID] = [t2].[REQID]
LEFT JOIN [CODE_VALUES] AS [c] ON [t0].[STATUS] = [c].[CODE_VALUE_ID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[ID], [c0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [c0].[AUTHORZIEDSIGNATURE], [c0].[CREATED_BY], [c0].[CREATED_DATE], [c0].[IHAC], [c0].[MODIFIED_BY], [c0].[MODIFIED_DATE], [c0].[POAMOUNT], [c0].[POCOMPLETE], [c0].[POCOMPLETEDATE], [c0].[PODATEREQUIRED], [c0].[PODESCRIPTION], [c0].[POMEMO], [c0].[PONUMBER], [c0].[POOPENDATE], [c0].[POSHIPVIA], [c0].[POTRANSMITTDATE], [c0].[POTYPE], [c0].[POFOB], [c0].[SAC], [c0].[WHOID]

) AS [t3] ON [t0].[REQ_PO_ID] = [t3].[ID]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [i3].[Id], [i3].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i3].[WorkflowId], [i3].[STEP_LIMIT], [i3].[stepRole], [i3].[stepSeq], [i3].[StepStatus], [i3].[StepName]

) AS [t4] ON [t0].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ] = [t4].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (

    WHERE [i4].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t5] ON [t0].[ID] = [t5].[REQID]

    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT [i].[ID], [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i].[ATTENTO], [i].[CHECKOUT], [i].[CHECKOUTBYID], [i].[COMBINE], [i].[COMPLETE], [i].[CORRECTED], [i].[CREATED_BY], [i].[CREATED_DATE], [i].[INHOUSEPOMEMO], [i].[MODIFIED_BY], [i].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i].[PREPAREDBY], [i].[REQCHECK], [i].[REQDATE], [i].[REQDATECOMPLETE], [i].[REQDATEREQUIRED], [i].[REQDESCRIPTION], [i].[REQIHPONO], [i].[REQNUMBER], [i].[REQ_PO_ID], [i].[REQPRINT], [i].[SHIPTO], [i].[STATUS], [i].[STATUS_MESSAGE], [i].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ]

) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN [IHPODETAILS] AS [i1] ON [t0].[ID] = [i1].[REQID]
LEFT JOIN (

) AS [t1] ON [i1].[REQVENDOR] = [t1].[ID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i2].[ID], [i2].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i2].[CREATED_BY], [i2].[CREATED_DATE], [i2].[MODIFIED_BY], [i2].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i2].[REQBALANCE], [i2].[REQDISCOUNT], [i2].[REQID], [i2].[REQQUANTITY], [i2].[REQTOTAL], [i2].[REQTOTALPRICE], [i2].[REQUNITPRICE]

) AS [t2] ON [t0].[ID] = [t2].[REQID]
LEFT JOIN [CODE_VALUES] AS [c] ON [t0].[STATUS] = [c].[CODE_VALUE_ID]
LEFT JOIN (

    SELECT [c0].[ID], [c0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [c0].[AUTHORZIEDSIGNATURE], [c0].[CREATED_BY], [c0].[CREATED_DATE], [c0].[IHAC], [c0].[MODIFIED_BY], [c0].[MODIFIED_DATE], [c0].[POAMOUNT], [c0].[POCOMPLETE], [c0].[POCOMPLETEDATE], [c0].[PODATEREQUIRED], [c0].[PODESCRIPTION], [c0].[POMEMO], [c0].[PONUMBER], [c0].[POOPENDATE], [c0].[POSHIPVIA], [c0].[POTRANSMITTDATE], [c0].[POTYPE], [c0].[POFOB], [c0].[SAC], [c0].[WHOID]

    WHERE [i3].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t4] ON [t].[ID] = [t4].[REQID]
ORDER BY [t].[MODIFIED_DATE] DESC, [t].[ID], [i0].[ID], [t0].[ID], [t1].[ID], [c].[CODE_VALUE_ID], [t2].[ID], [t3].[Id]

    SELECT [t].[ID], [t].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [t].[ATTENTO], [t].[CHECKOUT], [t].[CHECKOUTBYID], [t].[COMBINE], [t].[COMPLETE], [t].[CORRECTED], [t].[CREATED_BY], [t].[CREATED_DATE], [t].[INHOUSEPOMEMO], [t].[MODIFIED_BY], [t].[MODIFIED_DATE], [t].[PREPAREDBY], [t].[REQCHECK], [t].[REQDATE], [t].[REQDATECOMPLETE], [t].[REQDATEREQUIRED], [t].[REQDESCRIPTION], [t].[REQIHPONO], [t].[REQNUMBER], [t].[REQ_PO_ID], [t].[REQPRINT], [t].[SHIPTO], [t].[STATUS], [t].[STATUS_MESSAGE], [t].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ]
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT [i].[ID], [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i].[ATTENTO], [i].[CHECKOUT], [i].[CHECKOUTBYID], [i].[COMBINE], [i].[COMPLETE], [i].[CORRECTED], [i].[CREATED_BY], [i].[CREATED_DATE], [i].[INHOUSEPOMEMO], [i].[MODIFIED_BY], [i].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i].[PREPAREDBY], [i].[REQCHECK], [i].[REQDATE], [i].[REQDATECOMPLETE], [i].[REQDATEREQUIRED], [i].[REQDESCRIPTION], [i].[REQIHPONO], [i].[REQNUMBER], [i].[REQ_PO_ID], [i].[REQPRINT], [i].[SHIPTO], [i].[STATUS], [i].[STATUS_MESSAGE], [i].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ]

        WHERE [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0 AND [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__OrgAccountId_0 AND ([i].[REQ_PO_ID] = @__poId_1 OR EXISTS (

            WHERE [i0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0 AND [i].[ID] = [i0].[REQID] AND [i0].[PO_ID] IS NOT NULL AND [i0].[PO_ID] = @__p_2))
    ) AS [t]
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_3 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_4 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN [IHPODETAILS] AS [i1] ON [t0].[ID] = [i1].[REQID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [v].[ID], [v].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [v].[1099], [v].[ACCOUNT_NO], [v].[ADDRESS1], [v].[ADDRESS2], [v].[AFFIDAVIT_DATE], [v].[CAC], [v].[CITY], [v].[CREATED_BY], [v].[CREATED_DATE], [v].[CUSTOMER_NUM], [v].[EMAIL_ADDRESS], [v].[FAX_NUMBER], [v].[ACTIVE_IND], [v].[MEMO], [v].[MODIFIED_BY], [v].[MODIFIED_DATE], [v].[NAME], [v].[PHONE], [v].[POC], [v].[REMITT_INVOICE], [v].[REMITT_INVOICE_YN], [v].[SAC], [v].[STATE], [v].[TAX_ID], [v].[VENDORB_ADDRESS1], [v].[VENDORB_ADDRESS2], [v].[VENDORB_CITY], [v].[VENDORB_PHONE], [v].[VENDORB_STATE], [v].[VENDORB_ZIP], [v].[VENDORCAT], [v].[VENDOR_NO], [v].[VENDOR_TYPE], [v].[W9Date], [v].[ZIP]

    WHERE [v].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t1] ON [i1].[REQVENDOR] = [t1].[ID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i2].[ID], [i2].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i2].[CREATED_BY], [i2].[CREATED_DATE], [i2].[MODIFIED_BY], [i2].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i2].[REQBALANCE], [i2].[REQDISCOUNT], [i2].[REQID], [i2].[REQQUANTITY], [i2].[REQTOTAL], [i2].[REQTOTALPRICE], [i2].[REQUNITPRICE]

    WHERE [i2].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t2] ON [t0].[ID] = [t2].[REQID]
LEFT JOIN [CODE_VALUES] AS [c] ON [t0].[STATUS] = [c].[CODE_VALUE_ID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[ID], [c0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [c0].[AUTHORZIEDSIGNATURE], [c0].[CREATED_BY], [c0].[CREATED_DATE], [c0].[IHAC], [c0].[MODIFIED_BY], [c0].[MODIFIED_DATE], [c0].[POAMOUNT], [c0].[POCOMPLETE], [c0].[POCOMPLETEDATE], [c0].[PODATEREQUIRED], [c0].[PODESCRIPTION], [c0].[POMEMO], [c0].[PONUMBER], [c0].[POOPENDATE], [c0].[POSHIPVIA], [c0].[POTRANSMITTDATE], [c0].[POTYPE], [c0].[POFOB], [c0].[SAC], [c0].[WHOID]

) AS [t4] ON [t0].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ] = [t4].[WorkflowId]

        SELECT DISTINCT [i].[ID], [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i].[ATTENTO], [i].[CHECKOUT], [i].[CHECKOUTBYID], [i].[COMBINE], [i].[COMPLETE], [i].[CORRECTED], [i].[CREATED_BY], [i].[CREATED_DATE], [i].[INHOUSEPOMEMO], [i].[MODIFIED_BY], [i].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i].[PREPAREDBY], [i].[REQCHECK], [i].[REQDATE], [i].[REQDATECOMPLETE], [i].[REQDATEREQUIRED], [i].[REQDESCRIPTION], [i].[REQIHPONO], [i].[REQNUMBER], [i].[REQ_PO_ID], [i].[REQPRINT], [i].[SHIPTO], [i].[STATUS], [i].[STATUS_MESSAGE], [i].[WORKFLOWSTEPSEQ]
        FROM [IHPO] AS [i]
        WHERE [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0 AND [i].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__OrgAccountId_0 AND ([i].[REQ_PO_ID] = @__poId_1 OR EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM [IHPOLINEITEM] AS [i0]
            WHERE [i0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0 AND [i].[ID] = [i0].[REQID] AND [i0].[PO_ID] IS NOT NULL AND [i0].[PO_ID] = @__p_2))
    ) AS [t]
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_3 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_4 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN [IHPODETAILS] AS [i1] ON [t0].[ID] = [i1].[REQID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [v].[ID], [v].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [v].[1099], [v].[ACCOUNT_NO], [v].[ADDRESS1], [v].[ADDRESS2], [v].[AFFIDAVIT_DATE], [v].[CAC], [v].[CITY], [v].[CREATED_BY], [v].[CREATED_DATE], [v].[CUSTOMER_NUM], [v].[EMAIL_ADDRESS], [v].[FAX_NUMBER], [v].[ACTIVE_IND], [v].[MEMO], [v].[MODIFIED_BY], [v].[MODIFIED_DATE], [v].[NAME], [v].[PHONE], [v].[POC], [v].[REMITT_INVOICE], [v].[REMITT_INVOICE_YN], [v].[SAC], [v].[STATE], [v].[TAX_ID], [v].[VENDORB_ADDRESS1], [v].[VENDORB_ADDRESS2], [v].[VENDORB_CITY], [v].[VENDORB_PHONE], [v].[VENDORB_STATE], [v].[VENDORB_ZIP], [v].[VENDORCAT], [v].[VENDOR_NO], [v].[VENDOR_TYPE], [v].[W9Date], [v].[ZIP]
    FROM [VENDOR] AS [v]
    WHERE [v].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t1] ON [i1].[REQVENDOR] = [t1].[ID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i2].[ID], [i2].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i2].[CREATED_BY], [i2].[CREATED_DATE], [i2].[MODIFIED_BY], [i2].[MODIFIED_DATE], [i2].[REQBALANCE], [i2].[REQDISCOUNT], [i2].[REQID], [i2].[REQQUANTITY], [i2].[REQTOTAL], [i2].[REQTOTALPRICE], [i2].[REQUNITPRICE]

    WHERE [i2].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t2] ON [t0].[ID] = [t2].[REQID]
LEFT JOIN [CODE_VALUES] AS [c] ON [t0].[STATUS] = [c].[CODE_VALUE_ID]
LEFT JOIN (

    WHERE [c0].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID] = @__ef_filter__OrgAccountId_0
) AS [t3] ON [t0].[REQ_PO_ID] = [t3].[ID]

    SELECT [i3].[Id], [i3].[ORG_ACCOUNT_ID], [i3].[WorkflowId], [i3].[STEP_LIMIT], [i3].[stepRole], [i3].[stepSeq], [i3].[StepStatus], [i3].[StepName]

) AS [t5] ON [t0].[ID] = [t5].[REQID]
